title: Julie's Marble Brownies
instructions: Lightly butter a 4-quart oblong pan (15 × 10½ × 2 inches).
Melt chocolate and butter together using a double boiler or microwave, stirring every 30 seconds.
Cool the chocolate mixture for 5–10 minutes.
Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
Fold in flour by hand and set aside.
In a separate bowl, beat all cheesecake ingredients until smooth.
Spread ⅔ of the brownie batter into the prepared pan.
Drop spoonfuls of cheesecake batter evenly over the surface.
Drop remaining brownie batter between cheesecake mounds, not directly on top.
Using the handle of a wooden spoon or chopstick, drag lines through the batter lengthwise, then crosswise, to create a marble pattern.
Gently shake pan to level batter.
notes: Cheesecake batter ingredients should be at room temperature for best results.
